item.title: 曝苹果新 CEO 正在重组设计团队
item.guid: 曝苹果新-CEO-正在重组设计团队
item.description:
According to Bloomberg, John Ternus, who is set to take over as Apple CEO in September this year, is reorganizing the industrial design team, which has been plagued by talent drain, in an effort to restore product design to its core decision-making position within the company. 据彭博社报道，即将于今年 9 月接任苹果 CEO 的约翰·特努斯（John Ternus）正着手重组陷入人才流失的工业设计团队，以期恢复产品设计在公司内部的核心决策地位。

According to reports, CEO-designate Ternus has personally intervened and taken over the supervision of Apple's design team. 据报道，候任 CEO 特努斯已亲自介入并接管苹果设计团队的督导工作。

At recent internal meetings, he explicitly stated that design is at the core of Apple's business and that the company will continue to focus on ensuring the delivery of products with industry-leading design standards to users. 其在近期的内部会议上明确表态，设计是苹果业务的核心，未来将持续聚焦并确保向用户交付具备行业顶级设计标准的产品。

Ternus plans to overturn the existing management structure after officially taking office, seek a new design head who can reshape the organizational structure, and restore the position's direct seat in Apple's core executive team. 特努斯计划在正式上任后推翻现有的管理架构，寻找一位能够重塑组织结构的新任设计主管，并恢复该岗位在苹果核心高管团队中的直属席位。

Currently, Apple's Industrial Design (ID) department is led by veteran designer Molly Anderson, who previously lacked experience in managing large teams; meanwhile, the software interface design department, after former head Alan Dye led part of the team to Meta, is now overseen by Steve Lemay. 目前，苹果工业设计（ID）部门由资深设计师莫莉·安德森（Molly Anderson）领导，但其此前缺乏大型团队管理经验；同时，软件界面设计部门在原负责人艾伦·戴伊（Alan Dye）带领部分团队跳槽加盟 Meta 后，现由史蒂夫·勒梅（Steve Lemay）接管。

Due to management turmoil and insufficient core talent reserves, the pace of aesthetic iteration for several of Apple's main product lines, including iPhone, Apple Watch, AirPods, and Mac, has significantly slowed in recent years. 受制于管理层动荡与核心人才储备不足，苹果旗下 iPhone、Apple Watch、AirPods 及 Mac 等多条主力产品线的外观迭代速度近年来已显著放缓。

item.title: 微信原生 AI 助手「小微」灰度上线，可用对话操作微信原生功能
item.guid: 微信原生-AI-助手「小微」灰度上线，可用对话操作微信原生功能
item.description:
According to a June 20 report by XCiOS Club, WeChat's native AI assistant "Xiaowei" has expanded its grayscale testing scope. 据 XCiOS 俱乐部 6 月 20 日报道，微信原生 AI 助手「小微」扩大灰度测试范围。

    Moments: View recent 2-day activity, view friends' Moments, filter by topic, view popularity rankings

    Mini Programs: Help you with shopping, ordering takeout, hailing a taxi, checking express delivery, buying movie tickets, booking hotels, recharging phone bills

    WeChat Music: Search for songs, recommend, play songs, etc.

    WeChat Search: Search official account articles, search Video Account content, search information across the entire network

    Location Services: Get your location, check nearby businesses, navigate

    Reminders/To-do: Set schedule reminders, record reminders within chats

    AI Memory: Records your chat information, preferences, remembers context across turns, etc.

Tencent Customer Service stated that "Xiaowei" is a native AI assistant currently undergoing small-scale internal testing by the WeChat team, accessible via the "Xiaowei" icon in the upper left corner of the WeChat main interface; Xiaowei is a built-in system function and currently does not support being turned off. 腾讯客服表示，「小微」是微信团队正在小范围内测的原生 AI 助手，可通过微信主界面左上角「小微」标志进入使用；小微是系统内置功能，目前暂不支持关闭。

item.title: OpenAI 上调收入预期，但预计 2030 年前多消耗 1110 亿美元现金
item.guid: OpenAI-上调收入预期，但预计-2030-年前多消耗-1110-亿美元现金
item.description:
According to The Information, OpenAI recently raised its revenue forecast for the next five years, expecting revenue from businesses such as ChatGPT subscriptions, AI models, advertising, and hardware to be about 27% higher than previously projected. 据 The Information 报道，OpenAI 近期上调未来五年收入预期，预计来自 ChatGPT 订阅、AI 模型、广告和硬件等业务的收入将较此前预测高出约 27%。

However, the company also expects cash consumption to increase by $111 billion by 2030 compared to previous forecasts, with $665 billion to be invested in AI operation and training costs. 但公司同时预计，到 2030 年前现金消耗将较此前预测增加 1110 亿美元，并将在 AI 运行和训练成本上投入 6650 亿美元。

The report mentioned that OpenAI's revenue last year was $13.1 billion, is expected to increase to $30 billion this year, and approximately $62 billion next year. 报道提到，OpenAI 去年收入为 131 亿美元，今年预计增至 300 亿美元，明年约为 620 亿美元。

In terms of costs, OpenAI's cash consumption last year was $8 billion, is expected to rise to $25 billion this year, and further increase to $57 billion next year. Its AI model inference costs grew approximately fourfold last year, and its adjusted gross margin fell from 40% in the previous year to 33%, lower than the previously expected 46%. OpenAI still expects to achieve positive cash flow by 2030. 成本方面，OpenAI 去年现金消耗为 80 亿美元，今年预计升至 250 亿美元，明年进一步增至 570 亿美元。其 AI 模型推理成本去年增长约 4 倍，调整后毛利率从前一年的 40% 降至 33%，低于此前 46% 的预期。OpenAI 仍预计将在 2030 年实现现金流转正。

In terms of user growth, ChatGPT recently reached 910 million weekly active users, falling short of OpenAI's previous goal of reaching 1 billion by the end of last year. The company expects ChatGPT's weekly active users to reach 2.75 billion by 2030. 用户增长方面，ChatGPT 近期周活跃用户达到 9.1 亿，低于 OpenAI 此前希望去年底达到 10 亿的目标。公司预计，到 2030 年 ChatGPT 周活跃用户将达到 27.5 亿。

item.title: 特斯拉 2018 年薪酬方案收官，马斯克暴赚 7800 亿元
item.guid: 特斯拉-2018-年薪酬方案收官，马斯克暴赚-7800-亿元
item.description:
According to Electrek, Tesla CEO Elon Musk has fully exercised his options related to the 2018 CEO compensation plan, acquiring 304 million shares of Tesla stock at a split-adjusted exercise price of $23.34 per share. 据 Electrek 报道，特斯拉 CEO 埃隆·马斯克已全额行使其 2018 年 CEO 薪酬方案相关期权，以拆分调整后的每股 23.34 美元行权价获得 3.04 亿股特斯拉股票。

Based on Tesla's closing price of $404.66 per share on June 16, this transaction corresponds to a book gain of approximately $116 billion, or about 780 billion RMB . 按特斯拉 6 月 16 日每股 404.66 美元收盘价计算， 该交易对应账面收益约 1160 亿美元，约合人民币 7800 亿元 。

After settlement, Musk net added approximately 286 million shares of Tesla stock. However, these shares are still restricted stock, requiring vesting until January 19, 2028, and come with service term conditions, meaning they cannot be sold at this stage. 完成结算后，马斯克净新增约 2.86 亿股特斯拉股票。不过，这部分股票仍属于限制性股票，需等到 2028 年 1 月 19 日归属，且附带服务期限条件，现阶段不能出售。

This compensation plan was first granted in 2018, with an original size of 20.26 million shares and an exercise price of $350.02 per share. 这笔薪酬方案最早于 2018 年授予，原始规模为 2026 万股，行权价为每股 350.02 美元。

item.title: 雷军回应武汉街边过早热议：嘲讽也有流量
item.guid: 雷军回应武汉街边过早热议：嘲讽也有流量
item.description:
According to Bianews, Lei Jun appeared at the Beijing International Book Fair yesterday, discussing the previous heated debate about him having 'breakfast' on the streets of Wuhan. Lei Jun stated that such a simple matter trending for several days surprised him. 据鞭牛士报道，雷军昨日现身北京国际图书博览会，谈及此前在武汉街边「过早」引发热议一事。雷军表示，这样一件简单的事连续多日登上热搜，令他感到意外。

Lei Jun mentioned during the event that in the current traffic-driven environment, 'praising you gets traffic, criticizing you gets traffic, and mocking you gets even more traffic,' which might be the price public figures have to pay. 雷军在活动中提到，在当下流量环境下，「夸你有流量，骂你也有流量，嘲讽你更有流量」，这可能是公众人物需要承受的代价。

He further stated that some attackers might not have a clear stance, but merely aim to gain traffic, and there are even 'troll farms' profiting from traffic, so when the public sees such reports, 'just laugh it off.' 他进一步表示，部分攻击者可能并无明确立场，只是为了获取流量，甚至存在水军公司通过流量获利，因此公众看到相关报道时「笑一笑就好」。

item.title: 刘强东：未来不再需要快递员，京东拟培训 70 万蓝领员工转岗
item.guid: 刘强东：未来不再需要快递员，京东拟培训-70-万蓝领员工转岗
item.description:
According to Sina Finance, at yesterday's 2026 APEC China Business Leaders Forum, JD.com founder Richard Liu revealed that JD.com recently proposed an internal 'Nirvana Plan,' hoping to send its existing 700,000 blue-collar employees, such as delivery personnel, to schools for technical training to cope with the impact of AI and technological development. 据新浪财经报道，在昨日的 2026 年 APEC 工商领导人中国论坛上，京东集团创始人刘强东透露，京东近期在内部提出「涅槃计划」，希望将已有的 70 万快递员等蓝领员工送到学校接受技术培训，以应对 AI 和技术发展带来的冲击。

Richard Liu stated that future delivery work will be completed by robots, 'in the future, robots will deliver everything, there will be no need for delivery personnel at all,' but JD.com does not want its 700,000 employees to lose their jobs because of this. 刘强东表示，未来配送工作将由机器人完成，「将来都是机器人送货了，根本不需要快递员」，但京东并不希望 70 万名员工因此失去工作。

To this end, JD.com has signed contracts with 120 schools nationwide, planning to send relevant employees for training, who can then engage in work such as robot repair and maintenance in the future. 为此，京东已在全国签约 120 所学校，计划将相关员工送去接受培训，未来可从事机器人维修、保养等工作。

He mentioned that machines can also malfunction and still require human maintenance. Through training, JD.com hopes to encourage some blue-collar employees to transition to technical positions, 'allowing them to work in offices, no longer having to brave the wind and rain.' 他提到，机器也可能发生故障，仍需要人员进行维护。通过培训，京东希望推动部分蓝领员工转向技术岗位，「让他们住在办公室里面，不用再风里来雨里去」。

Richard Liu also stated that when applying new technologies, enterprises should make human lives better and work more interesting, rather than letting technology deprive humans of their rights. 刘强东还表示，企业在应用新技术时，应让人类生活变得更好、工作变得更有趣，而不是让技术剥夺人类的权利。

item.title: 微博 CEO 回应吐槽「被 WPS 背刺了」登上热搜：自己养的虾发的
item.guid: 微博-CEO-回应吐槽「被-WPS-背刺了」登上热搜：自己养的虾发的
item.description:
Yesterday, the Weibo topic 'WPS backstabbed me' trended, with discussions mainly focusing on issues such as WPS storage occupation, data security, and business strategy. 昨日，微博话题「被 wps 背刺了」登上热搜，讨论主要集中在 WPS 存储占用、数据安全与商业策略等问题。

Weibo CEO Wang Gaofei's account 'Lai Qu Zhi Jian' also posted relevant content, stating, 'Was WPS a backstab? What truly backstabbed us was the illusion of "domestic substitution".' 微博 CEO 王高飞的账号「来去之间」也发布了相关内容，文中称「被 WPS 背刺了？我们真正被背刺的，是对『国产替代』的幻觉」。

It's worth noting that this related blog post carried an 'AI Generated' label. Subsequently, Wang Gaofei clarified on Weibo, stating that the content was 'posted by his own pet shrimp.' 值得注意的是，这篇相关博文带有「AI 生成」标识。随后，王高飞在微博作出澄清，称相关内容是「自己养的虾发的」。

item.title: 乘联分会秘书长：5 月国内新能源零售渗透率升至 62.9%
item.guid: 乘联分会秘书长：5-月国内新能源零售渗透率升至-62.9%
item.description:
Cui Dongshu, Secretary-General of the China Passenger Car Association (CPCA), posted yesterday that in May 2026, the domestic passenger car market showed characteristics of 'overall pressure and significant structural differentiation,' with 'cold fuel vehicles, hot new energy vehicles' becoming the biggest focus. 乘联分会秘书长崔东树昨日发文称，2026 年 5 月国内乘用车市场呈现「总量承压、结构性大分化」特征，「燃油冷、新能源热」成为最大焦点。

Cui Dongshu stated that the core reason for the decline in domestic retail sales is the decline in fuel vehicle sales. 崔东树表示，国内零售下滑的核心原因是燃油车销售下滑。

    New energy vehicle retail penetration rate rose to 62.9%, reaching a new historical high, with the speed of automotive electrification exceeding expectations.

    The new energy transformation of joint venture brands is also accelerating, with mainstream joint venture new energy vehicles' domestic retail sales increasing by 51% year-on-year in May, and Buick new energy vehicles accounting for 45% of that.

In terms of price segments, in May, domestic independent brands' retail share of passenger cars in the 200,000-300,000 RMB, 300,000-400,000 RMB, and above 400,000 RMB segments all exceeded 50%. 价格带方面，5 月国内自主品牌在 20-30 万元、30-40 万元、40 万元以上乘用车零售占比均超过 50%；

However, micro electric vehicles and A-segment cars are under pressure, and the entry-level consumer market still needs policy support. In terms of exports, new energy vehicles accounted for 54% of vehicles exported in May, also hitting a new historical high. 但微型电动车和 A 级车承压，入门级消费市场仍需要政策支持。出口方面，5 月出口车辆中新能源占比达到 54%，同样创历史新高。

item.title: 华润新能源将启动深交所史上最大规模 IPO 申购
item.guid: 华润新能源将启动深交所史上最大规模-IPO-申购
item.description:
China Resources New Energy, the core new energy platform under China Resources, will launch online and offline subscriptions on the Shenzhen Stock Exchange on June 22. The total amount of funds expected to be raised is 24.5 billion yuan, exceeding the scale of Jinlongyu's IPO in 2020, which was approximately 13.9 billion yuan. The raised funds will be primarily used for the construction of wind power and solar power generation projects. 中国华润旗下核心新能源平台华润新能源将于 6 月 22 日在深交所启动网上网下申购，预计募集资金总额 245 亿元，超过 2020 年金龙鱼 IPO 约 139 亿元的规模。募集资金用途集中在风力发电和太阳能发电项目建设。

According to the offering announcement, China Resources New Energy's offering price is 10.11 yuan per share, with an online subscription limit of 632,000 shares. The company plans to publicly offer 2.107 billion shares, accounting for approximately 16.20% of the total share capital after the offering; if the over-allotment option is fully exercised, the total number of shares offered will expand to 2.423 billion shares, accounting for approximately 18.19% of the total share capital after the offering. 发行公告显示，华润新能源本次发行价为 10.11 元 / 股，网上申购上限 63.2 万股。公司计划公开发行 21.07 亿股，占发行后总股本约 16.20%；若超额配售选择权全额行使，发行总股数将扩大至 24.23 亿股，占发行后总股本约 18.19%。

item.title: 网易云音乐旗下 AI 陪伴 App「妙时」将于 7 月停运
item.guid: 网易云音乐旗下-AI-陪伴-App「妙时」将于-7-月停运
item.description:
NetEase Cloud Music's AI emotional companionship app "Miaoshi" has announced its discontinuation. The platform has stopped new user registrations, top-ups, and membership purchases, and will officially cease operations at 0:00 on July 14. 网易云音乐旗下 AI 情感陪伴 App「妙时」发布停运公告，平台已停止新用户注册、充值及会员购买，并将于 7 月 14 日 0 时正式停止运营。

After the discontinuation, "Miaoshi" will close all functions. Users can apply for refunds for Miaoshi Coins, Cookie Coins, and membership fees in their accounts, and the platform states it will process related balances and membership rights according to the rules. 停运后，「妙时」会关闭所有功能。用户账号中的妙时币、曲奇币和会员费可申请退款，平台称会按规则处理相关余额和会员权益。

item.title: 挪威拟禁止小学生使用生成式 AI
item.guid: 挪威拟禁止小学生使用生成式-AI
item.description:
According to Reuters, the Norwegian government will almost completely ban primary school students from using generative AI tools and restrict their use in secondary schools starting from the new academic year in late August. 据路透社报道，挪威政府将从 8 月下旬新学年开始，近乎禁止小学阶段学生使用生成式 AI 工具，并限制中学阶段的相关使用。

Norwegian Prime Minister Jonas Gahr Stoere stated that the school's most important task is to teach children to read, write, and do math, and uncritical use of AI would cause students to skip critical learning steps. The Norwegian government had previously banned the use of smartphones in schools in 2024 and granted teachers more authority over classroom discipline. 挪威首相 Jonas Gahr Stoere 表示，学校最重要的任务是让孩子学会阅读、写作和数学，无批判地使用 AI 会让学生跳过关键学习步骤。挪威政府此前已在 2024 年禁止学校使用智能手机，并赋予教师更多课堂纪律管理权。

The new rules apply to grades 1 to 7, meaning students aged approximately 6 to 13 are generally prohibited from using generative AI; older students may still use it in more controlled teaching scenarios. 新规适用于 1 至 7 年级，约 6 至 13 岁学生原则上不得使用生成式 AI；高年级学生仍可在更受控的教学场景中使用。

item.title: 智谱 GLM-5.2 登顶 DeepSWE 开源第一
item.guid: 智谱-GLM-5.2-登顶-DeepSWE-开源第一
item.description:
Zhipu AI's open-source model GLM-5.2 has entered the DeepSWE v1.1 benchmark list for long-range software engineering. In the highest thinking intensity mode, GLM-5.2 achieved a Pass@1 of 44%±2%, ranking fifth among the 9 models on the current list and being the best-performing open-source model on the list. 智谱 AI 开源模型 GLM-5.2 已进入长程软件工程基准 DeepSWE v1.1 榜单。在最高思考力度模式下，GLM-5.2 的 Pass@1 为 44%±2%，在当前榜单 9 个模型中位列第五，也是榜单中表现最好的开源模型。

List data shows that GLM-5.2's average cost in the highest thinking intensity mode is $3.92, with an average output of 78,000 tokens and an average of 129 execution steps. 榜单数据显示，GLM-5.2 在最高思考力度下的平均成本为 3.92 美元，平均输出 7.8 万 token，平均执行 129 步。

Compared to Kimi K2.7 Code, GLM-5.2's Pass@1 is 13 percentage points higher, but its average cost is also higher than the latter's $2.82. 相比 Kimi K2.7 Code，GLM-5.2 的 Pass@1 高出 13 个百分点，但平均成本也高于后者的 2.82 美元。

item.title: 淬思科技完成首轮融资，计划今年年底前完成芯片流片
item.guid: 淬思科技完成首轮融资，计划今年年底前完成芯片流片
item.description:
According to DeepTech, Shanghai Quisi Technology Co., Ltd., an AI inference chip company, recently completed its incubation round of financing, co-led by Monolith Capital and Qiying Tongchuang Fund. 据 DeepTech 深科技报道，AI 推理芯片公司上海淬思科技有限公司近日完成孵化轮融资，由砺思资本（Monolith）与启盈同创基金联合领投。

This round of funding will be used for the research and development and tape-out of its first dedicated chip for AI agent inference, as well as the expansion of its core team. 本轮资金将用于其首款面向 AI 智能体推理的专用芯片研发与流片，以及核心团队扩充。

The company primarily targets large model inference scenarios, aiming to solve the problems of long design cycles, repeated architectural adjustments, and difficulty in keeping pace with demand in custom AI chips amidst rapidly changing model architectures and application requirements. 公司主要面向大模型推理场景，试图解决定制 AI 芯片在模型架构和应用需求快速变化下，设计周期长、架构反复调整、交付节奏难以跟上需求的问题。

The report states that Quisi Technology's Agentic EDA platform has generated commercial revenue, and its chip design methodology has been verified through actual chip tape-out and return, with results meeting expectations. 报道称，淬思科技的 Agentic EDA 平台已产生商业化收入，其芯片设计方法学已通过真实芯片流片与回片验证，结果符合预期。

item.title: 现代汽车拟收购软银持有的波士顿动力剩余股权
item.guid: 现代汽车拟收购软银持有的波士顿动力剩余股权
item.description:
According to The Next Web, Hyundai Motor Group plans to acquire SoftBank Group's 9.65% stake in Boston Dynamics for 500 billion Korean Won, approximately 2.223 billion RMB. After the transaction, Boston Dynamics will become a wholly-owned subsidiary of Hyundai Motor Group. 据 The Next Web 报道，现代汽车集团计划收购软银集团持有的波士顿动力 9.65% 股份，交易价格为 5000 亿韩元，约合人民币 22.23 亿元。交易完成后，波士顿动力将成为现代汽车集团的全资子公司。

Hyundai Motor Group acquired an 80% stake in Boston Dynamics from SoftBank in June 2021, with SoftBank retaining a minority stake at the time. The report states that SoftBank has informed Hyundai Motor Group of its desire to exercise the put option agreed upon in their original transaction, selling the remaining shares to Hyundai; Hyundai is expected to hold a board meeting on June 22 to approve this acquisition. 现代汽车集团 2021 年 6 月从软银手中收购波士顿动力 80% 股份，软银当时保留少数股权。报道称，软银已通知现代汽车集团，希望行使双方最初交易中约定的看跌期权，把剩余股份出售给现代；现代预计于 6 月 22 日召开董事会批准这笔收购。

item.title: 中星 10 号卫星在轨运行 15 年，超过设计寿命
item.guid: 中星-10-号卫星在轨运行-15-年，超过设计寿命
item.description:
According to the China Academy of Space Technology, the Zhongxing-10 satellite, developed based on the Dongfanghong-4 common platform, has been operating stably for 15 years, exceeding its designed lifespan in orbit. 据中国空间技术研究院消息，基于东方红四号公用平台研制的中星 10 号卫星已稳定运行 15 年，在轨时间超过设计寿命。

Zhongxing-10 was approved in 2008 and launched in 2011. It is a communication satellite developed based on the Dongfanghong-4 platform. Among satellites on the same platform, it has more transponders, a larger launch weight, higher power requirements, and for the first time adopted technologies such as high-power solar array drives. 中星 10 号于 2008 年立项、2011 年发射，是基于东方红四号平台研制的通信卫星。它在同平台卫星中转发器路数更多、发射重量更大、功率要求更高，并首次采用大功率太阳帆板驱动等技术。

The satellite also adopted a "Chinese satellite common platform + foreign payload" development model. After being put into operation, it undertakes tasks such as uplink transmission of broadcast and television signals, enterprise dedicated lines, distance education, telemedicine, and emergency communication for disaster relief. 该星还采用「中方卫星公用平台 + 外方有效载荷」研制模式，投入应用后承担广播电视信号上行传输、企业专线、远程教育、远程医疗和抢险救灾应急通信等任务。

item.title: 💡 梁朝伟：AI 能节省制作时间，但没有灵魂
item.guid: 💡-梁朝伟：AI-能节省制作时间，但没有灵魂
item.description:
According to The Hollywood Reporter, Tony Leung called AI a "double-edged sword" in an interview before the closing of the Shanghai International Film Festival. 据《好莱坞报道者》报道，梁朝伟在上海国际电影节闭幕前接受采访时，把 AI 称为「双刃剑」。

He believes that AI can save a lot of time and cost in pre-production and post-production, and such efficiency advantages will enter mainstream commercial films and popcorn movies faster; but it will also make some jobs disappear and simplify creation into computation. 他认为，AI 可以在前期和后期制作中节省大量时间和成本，这类效率优势会更快进入主流商业片和爆米花电影；但它也会让一些岗位消失，并把创作简化成计算。

It's just computation, without a soul.

Tony Leung pointed out that acting and filmmaking still rely on human observation, experience, and emotional accumulation, and young audiences also need to re-learn how to appreciate different types of films, rather than just accepting one template. 梁朝伟指出，表演和电影仍依赖人的观察、经验和情感积累，年轻观众也需要重新学习如何欣赏不同类型的电影，而非只接受一种模板。

He contrasted this with his own upbringing: in the 1970s, there were many cinemas on the streets of Hong Kong, and the screen experience formed his basic understanding of cinema. 他以自己成长经历作对照：上世纪 70 年代的香港街头有很多电影院，银幕体验构成了他对电影的基本理解。

He stated that he rarely watches movies at home because the big screen preserves more cinematic language and details; in an era where short videos, streaming, and games distract attention, the film industry needs to find ways to invite young people into cinemas. 他表示，自己几乎不在家看电影，因为大银幕能保留更多电影语言和细节；在短视频、流媒体和游戏分散注意力的时代，电影业需要找到邀请年轻人走进影院的方法。

item.title: 努比亚被曝集中资源投入第二代豆包 AI 手机
item.guid: 努比亚被曝集中资源投入第二代豆包-AI-手机
item.description:
Coreflow Think Tank recently reported that ZTE Nubia has adjusted its mobile phone business priorities internally, planning to concentrate core resources on the second-generation Doubao AI phone, while temporarily scaling back traditional mobile phone business lines. 芯流智库日前报道称，中兴努比亚内部已调整手机业务优先级，计划把核心资源集中投入第二代豆包 AI 手机，传统手机业务线暂时收缩。

Currently, the second-generation Doubao AI phone is still in the rumor and supply chain news stage. Previously, a blogger claimed that the device might be released in the first half of 2026 and feature the fifth-generation Snapdragon 8 Ultimate Edition mobile platform. 目前，第二代豆包 AI 手机仍处于传闻和供应链消息阶段。此前有博主称，该机可能在 2026 年上半年发布，并搭载第五代骁龙 8 至尊版移动平台。

item.title: 小米「寻天」七座 SUV 车顶升降帐篷曝光
item.guid: 小米「寻天」七座-SUV-车顶升降帐篷曝光
item.description:
Blogger "SugarDesign" recently released the latest spy photos of the Xiaomi "Xuntian" SUV, showing that the larger seven-seater version is suspected to be equipped with a retractable roof device. In the pictures, after the test car's roof tent is raised, it appears higher at the front and lower at the back, with a breathable mesh structure around it. 博主「SugarDesign」日前发布小米「寻天」SUV 最新谍照显示，体型更大的七座版车型疑似配备车顶升降装置。图片中，测试车顶部帐篷升起后呈前高后低形态，四周带有可通风的纱网结构。

Previous news stated that the "Xuntian" SUV will offer two models, a seven-seater and a five-seater, both with relatively square lines and expected to be equipped with semi-hidden door handles. 此前消息称，「寻天」SUV 将提供七座和五座两种车型，两车线条较为方正，预计配备半隐藏式门把手。

item.title: 领克 07GT 将于 6 月 29 日开启预售
item.guid: 领克-07GT-将于-6-月-29-日开启预售
item.description:
Lynk & Co Auto announced that the Lynk & Co family's first wagon, the 07GT, will open for pre-sale on June 29. The car adopts the "The Next Day" design language, features a lidar on the front, semi-hidden door handles, and a 1.9-square-meter four-layer heat-insulating and sun-proof panoramic roof. 领克汽车宣布，领克家族首款旅行车 07GT 将于 6 月 29 日开启预售，该车沿用「The Next Day」设计语言，车头配备激光雷达，车身采用半隐藏式门把手，车顶配有 1.9 平方米四层隔热防晒天幕。

In terms of the cockpit, the Lynk & Co 07GT will be equipped with the Flyme Auto 2.5 in-car system, featuring a 15.4-inch floating central control screen and integrated sports seats. 座舱方面，领克 07GT 将搭载 Flyme Auto 2.5 车机系统，使用 15.4 英寸悬浮式中控屏，并配备运动一体式座椅。

The official previously positioned this car as a GT wagon for family and long-distance travel scenarios, complementing Lynk & Co's sedan and SUV body styles. 官方此前把这款车定位为面向家庭和长途出行场景的 GT 旅行车，用来补齐领克轿车、SUV 之外的车身形态。

item.title: 曝小米平板 9 标准版采用骁龙 8s Gen 4 和 9720mAh 电池
item.guid: 曝小米平板-9-标准版采用骁龙-8s-Gen-4-和-9720mAh-电池
item.description:
According to ximitime, Xiaomi Pad 9 is expected to launch with a standard version and a Pro version, where the standard version may reuse the hardware and firmware platform of Xiaomi Pad 8. 据 ximitime 报道，小米平板 9 预计将推出标准版和 Pro 版，其中标准版可能复用小米平板 8 的硬件和固件平台。

Leaked code shows that the estimated model number for Xiaomi Pad 9 Standard Edition is M656BA, with an internal codename "donghai," and it is associated with Xiaomi Pad 8's "yupei" codename. 泄露代码显示，小米平板 9 标准版预估型号为 M656BA，内部代号为「donghai」，并与小米平板 8 的「yupei」代号存在关联。

Developer Kacper discovered that the device shares a hardware platform with Xiaomi Pad 8, and the firmware packages are highly related. Ximitime therefore speculates that Xiaomi might accelerate the HyperOS update pace by reusing the platform. 开发者 Kacper 发现，该机与小米平板 8 共享硬件平台，固件包高度相关，ximitime 因此推测小米可能通过复用平台加快 HyperOS 更新节奏。

In terms of configuration, leaks suggest that the Xiaomi Pad 9 Standard Edition may continue to use the Qualcomm Snapdragon 8s Gen 4 chip, with a battery capacity of 9720mAh, an increase of 520mAh compared to the Xiaomi Pad 8 Standard Edition's 9200mAh; 配置方面，爆料称小米平板 9 标准版可能继续采用高通骁龙 8s Gen 4 芯片，电池容量为 9720mAh，较小米平板 8 标准版的 9200mAh 增加 520mAh；

The Pro version, however, may be upgraded to the fifth-generation Snapdragon 8 chip, with the new product expected to be released in August. Pro 版则可能升级到第五代骁龙 8 芯片，新品预计 8 月发布。

item.title: 金山办公 7 月将推出组织级 AI 办公产品「企业大脑」
item.guid: 金山办公-7-月将推出组织级-AI-办公产品「企业大脑」
item.description:
Wang Shaokang, Vice President of Kingsoft Office, recently revealed at the 2026 People's Data Conference held in Zigong City, Sichuan Province, that the company will officially launch its organizational-level AI office product "Enterprise Brain" WPS Comate in July, with subsequent large-scale delivery. 金山办公副总裁王少康日前在四川省自贡市举行的 2026 人民数据大会上透露，公司将于 7 月正式推出组织级 AI 办公产品「企业大脑」WPS Comate，后续将规模化交付。

Kingsoft Office stated that "Enterprise Brain" differs from office intelligent agents aimed at improving personal efficiency, focusing instead on knowledge-intensive medium to large organizations and complex business scenarios. 金山办公称，「企业大脑」不同于面向个人效率提升的办公智能体，重点面向知识密集的中大型组织和复杂业务场景。

This product integrates structured and unstructured data within the organization, then uses AI to understand organizational structure and team collaboration relationships, generating AI products such as digital employees, and integrating them into business operations and decision-making processes. 该产品会整合组织内部的结构化与非结构化数据，再利用 AI 理解组织结构和团队协作关系，生成数字员工等 AI 产品，接入业务运营和决策环节。

item.title: 安踏发布「折纸科技」跑鞋缓震结构
item.guid: 安踏发布「折纸科技」跑鞋缓震结构
item.description:
According to 36Kr, Anta recently released a running shoe cushioning structure called "Origami Tech," attempting to improve energy management between landing and rebound by using midsole geometric structures rather than simple material stacking. 据 36 氪报道，安踏近日发布名为「折纸科技」的跑鞋缓震结构，试图通过中底几何结构而非单纯材料堆叠，提升跑鞋在落地和回弹之间的能量管理。

The idea behind this solution comes from origami structures: the midsole compresses and expands along preset creases when subjected to force, allowing runners to get cushioning during the landing phase and then release rebound during the push-off phase. 这套方案的思路来自折纸结构：中底在受力时按预设折痕压缩和展开，让跑者落地阶段获得缓冲，蹬伸阶段再释放回弹。

item.title: 央视曝光部分廉价充电宝 CCC 认证失效后仍在售
item.guid: 央视曝光部分廉价充电宝-CCC-认证失效后仍在售
item.description:
According to CCTV News, after reporters randomly investigated 7 merchants, they found that 4 of them were still selling power banks without valid CCC certification. China has included power banks in the scope of CCC certified products since 2024, and power banks without CCC certification cannot be shipped or sold. 据央视新闻报道，记者随机调查 7 家商户后发现，其中 4 家仍在销售没有有效 CCC 认证的充电宝。我国自 2024 年起已将充电宝纳入 CCC 认证产品范围，没有 CCC 认证的充电宝不能出厂和销售。

The report mentioned that the CCC certification marked on the detail page of power banks sold by a certain platform store has been canceled; after the reporter received the goods, it was found that the CCC certification certificates corresponding to the manufacturers marked on the products had also been canceled. 报道提到，某平台店铺销售的充电宝详情页标注的 CCC 认证已被注销；记者收货后发现，产品上标注的制造商对应的 CCC 认证证书也均已注销。

Subsequently, reporters sent several power banks without valid CCC certification certificates to the Safety Center Laboratory of the China Electronics Technology Standardization Institute for testing. 随后，记者把多款没有有效 CCC 认证证书的充电宝送至中国电子技术标准化研究院安全中心实验室检测。

Laboratory disassembly revealed that some power bank internal cells did not have manufacturer information printed as required; in the shell flame retardancy performance test, some products could not slow down combustion and might even become combustion aids. Experts stated that CCC certification certificates are not permanently valid, and continued sales after a certificate is suspended, revoked, or canceled are the current focus of industry rectification. 实验室拆解发现，部分充电宝内部电芯没有按要求印刷生产厂家信息；外壳阻燃性能测试中，部分产品无法减缓燃烧，甚至可能成为助燃物。专家称，CCC 认证证书并非永久有效，证书暂停、撤销或注销后继续销售，是当前行业整治重点。

item.title: 米哈游 AI 女友陪伴软件《BSide：Olivia Lin》上架 Steam
item.guid: 米哈游-AI-女友陪伴软件《BSide：Olivia-Lin》上架-Steam
item.description:
MiHoYo's "BSide: Olivia Lin" was recently launched on the Steam platform and currently supports adding to wishlists. 米哈游旗下《BSide：Olivia Lin》近日上架 Steam 平台，目前支持添加愿望单。

The store page shows that the protagonist, Olivia Lin, is set as a Shanghai girl majoring in piano and minoring in psychology, who likes vinyl records, old movies, and rainy days. 商店页面显示，主角林离 Olivia Lin 设定为主修钢琴、辅修心理学的上海女生，喜欢黑胶唱片、老电影和雨天。

The software offers features such as piano performance, generating music videos after MIDI file upload, writing and replying to letters, and dynamic desktop wallpapers. 软件提供钢琴演奏、MIDI 文件上传后生成音乐视频、文字写信和回信、桌面动态壁纸等功能。

item.title: 《群星闪耀时》定档 8 月 1 日
item.guid: 《群星闪耀时》定档-8-月-1-日
item.description:
The movie "When the Stars Shine" has officially announced its release date for August 1st and has released a teaser trailer. 电影《群星闪耀时》已官宣定档 8 月 1 日，并发布定档预告。

The trailer shows that the film uses a "sound from outer space" spanning 65 years as a clue, connecting astronauts Zheng Tongzhou, Liu Chen, Cao Yang from 2035 with Zhao Jihu and others from 1970, thus unfolding a cross-temporal rescue. 预告显示，影片以一段跨越 65 年的「天外来音」为线索，将 2035 年的航天员郑同舟、刘晨、曹洋与 1970 年的赵吉虎等人连接起来，由此展开一场跨时空救援。

item.title: 《想你了》发布「夏至」主题组图，章若楠金靖演绎夏日友情
item.guid: 《想你了》发布「夏至」主题组图，章若楠金靖演绎夏日友情
item.description:
The movie "Missing You" released a "Summer Solstice" themed photo series yesterday, featuring Zhang Ruonan and Jin Jing, with summer light and shadow and interactions with friends as the main visual elements. The film will be released on July 24th. 电影《想你了》昨日发布「夏至」主题组图，章若楠、金靖出镜，以夏日光影和好友互动为主要视觉元素。影片将于 7 月 24 日上映。

In the photo series, the two are dressed in smoky blue gauze dresses and light green long dresses respectively, depicting scenes such as holding watermelons, blowing bubbles, filming each other with a DV, and fanning themselves with a cattail fan to cool down, highlighting the familiarity and intimate relationship between the two female characters in the film. 组图中，两人分别身着烟蓝纱裙与浅绿长裙，呈现捧西瓜、吹泡泡、用 DV 互拍、摇蒲扇纳凉等场景，突出影片中两位女性角色之间的熟悉感与亲密关系。

"Missing You" is directed by Ma Yingxin, starring Zhang Ruonan and Jin Jing, telling the story of Gao Fan and Wang Meili, two girls who journey together and support each other, promising to be best friends for life. 《想你了》由麻赢心执导，章若楠、金靖领衔主演，讲述高凡与汪美丽两个一路同行、互为后盾的女生，约定成为一辈子好朋友的故事。
